roa.docketEntryComment: DEF MOT TO ADD TO CAL TO TERMINATE STAY AWAY ORDER FILED
DEFT'S ADD TO CALENDAR MOTION TO CORRECT ELECTRONIC MONITORING FILED
ATTY OPP TO MOT TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL FILED

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY MAKES AN ORAL MOTION FORFIRST DISMISSAL,/MO PC 1385: FURTHER INVESTIGATION NEEDED/CTORD: DEFENDANT'S ACM AND ELECTRONIC MONITORING REQUIREMENTS ARE TERMINATED/

/CAL: PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/CTORD: THE PREVIOUSLEY ORDERED RELEASE ON PRE-TRIAL ELECTRONIC MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT TO BE MODIFIED TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING/X: DEFENDANT SHALL NOT POSSESS ANY WEAPONS, ABIDE BY ANY STAY AWAY ORDER AND COURT HAS NOT OBJECTION TO TRAVEL OUTSIDE OF 50 MILES,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/CONT/DOP/X:THE COURT WILL ALLOW THE DEFENDANT TO TRAVEL TO 1970 22ND AVE, AND TO ST, CECILIA'S CHURCH AT 18TH AND VICENTESTS,, SF/

/X:DA MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL IS DENIED/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/STWPX/DEF:IS ORDERED RELEASED ON PRE-TRIAL ELECTRONIC MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE ON HOME DETENTION AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/ACM/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/WEAP/WS/CTORD:THE DEFENDANT TO NOT TRAVEL BEYOND 50 MILES OF SAN FRANCISCO/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/SA1:EDUARDO ALVARADO FERNANDEZ/SA2:THE INTERSECTIONS OF BUCHANNAN & HAIGHT AND FRANKLIN & GROVE STS,, SF/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/BAIL: 500,000/SAORD/SA1: EDUARDO ALVARADO FERNANDEZ/SAORD2/SAORD3/X: THE PEOPLE FILE: NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUTBAIL/X: EXHIBITS IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL IS FILED UNDER SEAL/X: ORDER SEALING EXHIBITS IN SUPPORT MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAILIS SIGNED AND FILED IN COURT/CONTD I&A P&C DOP/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT, PLEA ANDCOUNSEL/TWA/DOP/
/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION TO MODIFY ELECTRONIC MONITORING/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
